3. Follow the on-screen instructions to transfer the license from one device to another.

If you encounter any issues during the transfer process or need additional assistance, please don't hesitate to ask. You can also contact our Technical Assistance Center (TAC) for more detailed support if needed.

Is there anything else you'd like to know about the device transfer process?
